scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.ios:add: npx cap add ios && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File patch-ios.ps1
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File patch-ios.ps1
scripts.android:build: npm run android && npm run postandroid && cd android && .\gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android && npm run postandroid && cd android && .\gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run android && npm run postandroid && cd android && .\gradlew bundleRelease
